name: github_list_selected_repos_for_org_agent_secret
description: List repositories that can access a selected-visibility organization GitHub agent secret (GET /orgs/{org}/agents/secrets/{secret_name}/repositories). Returns total_count and repositories. per_page 1-100 default 100, page, all_pages, max_pages. Classic tokens need admin:org scope (plus repo for private repos). See GitHub REST Agents secrets.
